articles.title: The Subnautica 2 fish self-defence debate rages on, as the game’s non-violent themes clash with player desire to fend off underwater threats - Eurogamer
articles.description: Unknown Worlds has stayed true to its oceanic pacifism themes, while the realities of living with dangerous animals has some players frustrated.

articles.title: 'No One Else in the Business Would Have Done It' — Take-Two Boss Reveals Borderlands' Last Minute Art Style Change Cost an Extra $50 Million, but Insists the Game Would Have Flopped Without It - IGN
articles.description: Borderlands’ well-documented 11th hour art style change cost Take-Two an extra $50 million in development costs and delayed the game by a year, but without it the now successful franchise would have flopped straight out the gate.

articles.title: This music streaming app nobody talks about actually beats the giants - Android Police
articles.description: I'm never going back to Spotify or Tidal

articles.title: I pay for Gemini, ChatGPT, and Claude — and there's a clear winner - Android Authority
articles.description: I pay for ChatGPT, Gemini, and Claude. After spending time with all three, I keep coming back to only one of them.

articles.title: GTA 6 Pre-Orders Set To Arrive Today As PS5 Store Updates Early - GAMINGbible
articles.description: Reports claim six initial versions will be revealed.

articles.title: Xbox Game Pass loses another five games in May 2026 - TrueAchievements
articles.description: The next batch of games leaving Xbox Game Pass in May 2026 has now been confirmed. Another five games will drop out of the subscription service at the end of May.
